## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes (no new warnings)
- [ ] `pnpm knip` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated and `pnpm test` passes

- [ ] Docs/ADRs updated if architecture, data model, or conventions changed
